Class WelcomeActivity

android.app.Activity
androidx.core.app.ComponentActivity
androidx.activity.ComponentActivity
androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
com.example.codebase.WelcomeActivity
All Implemented Interfaces:
androidx.activity.contextaware.ContextAware, androidx.activity.FullyDrawnReporterOwner, androidx.activity.OnBackPressedDispatcherOwner, androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultCaller, androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultRegistryOwner, androidx.appcompat.app.ActionBarDrawerToggle.DelegateProvider, androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatCallback, androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.OnRequestPermissionsResultCallback, androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.RequestPermissionsRequestCodeValidator, androidx.core.app.OnMultiWindowModeChangedProvider, androidx.core.app.OnNewIntentProvider, androidx.core.app.OnPictureInPictureModeChangedProvider, androidx.core.app.TaskStackBuilder.SupportParentable, androidx.core.content.OnConfigurationChangedProvider, androidx.core.content.OnTrimMemoryProvider, androidx.core.view.KeyEventDispatcher.Component, androidx.core.view.MenuHost, androidx.lifecycle.HasDefaultViewModelProviderFactory, androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner, androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelStoreOwner, androidx.savedstate.SavedStateRegistryOwner
public class WelcomeActivity extends androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
Role selection screen displayed on every application launch.

Presents two role options to the user:

  • User (Entrant) — proceeds directly to OrganizerActivity.
  • Admin — must first pass a PIN challenge before proceeding to OrganizerActivity.

On first launch (i.e. the device has not been registered), the user is redirected to SplashActivity for initial setup. If a profile setup is still pending, the user is sent to ProfileSettingsActivity before reaching the main screen.

The selected role is persisted in

invalid reference 
SharedPreferences
under PREFS_NAME using the key KEY_ROLE, and can be retrieved from any context via getSessionRole(android.content.Context).

      public static final String PREFS_NAME
      Name of the
      invalid reference 
      SharedPreferences

    • KEY_ROLE

      public static final String KEY_ROLE
      invalid reference 
      SharedPreferences
      key for storing the currently selected role. Value will be one of ROLE_USER or ROLE_ADMIN.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • KEY_PROFILE_PENDING

      public static final String KEY_PROFILE_PENDING
      invalid reference 
      SharedPreferences
      key indicating whether the user still needs to complete profile setup. When true, the app routes to ProfileSettingsActivity before proceeding to the main screen.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ROLE_USER

      public static final String ROLE_USER
      Role constant for a standard entrant / end-user. Stored as the value of KEY_ROLE in
      invalid reference 
      SharedPreferences

    • onCreate

      protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Initialises the activity, reads the registration state from
      invalid reference 
      SharedPreferences
      , inflates the role-selection UI, and attaches click listeners to the role cards.
      Overrides:
      onCreate in class androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
      Parameters:
      savedInstanceState - If the activity is being re-created from a previous state, this bundle contains the most recent data; otherwise null.

    • getSessionRole

      public static String getSessionRole(android.content.Context ctx)
      Returns the role that was saved for the current session.

      This is a convenience helper allowing any component to retrieve the active role without holding a direct reference to WelcomeActivity.

      Parameters:
      ctx - Any
      invalid reference 
      android.content.Context
      ; used only to access
      invalid reference 
      SharedPreferences
      .
      Returns:
      The stored role string (ROLE_USER or ROLE_ADMIN). Defaults to ROLE_USER if no role has been saved yet.
